provenance.source_corpus: Do peat amendments to oil sands wet sediments affect Carex aquatilis biomass for reclamation success?

source_spans.text: We demonstrated that PM amendments to oil sands sediments significantly increased C. aquatilis survival as well as below and aboveground biomass.

We demonstrated that PM amendments to oil sands sediments significantly increased C. aquatilis survival as well as below and aboveground biomass.
The use of OSPW significantly reduced C. aquatilis belowground biomass and affected its physiological performance.
In CT sediment types, C. aquatilis growing in OSPW had a significantly higher PI when compared to plants growing in freshwater.
plant belowground biomass allocation was significantly lower in OSPW
